concept: Member / A Part of the Collective
description: An individual belonging to a group or community. The role emphasizes being an integral and valued part of a larger whole.
rationale: The gathering 'we' sound draws individuals into community, like streams converging into a river. This collective flow meets 'pa', the supportive foundation that holds each person's unique contribution. Together they speak membership's truth: not mere belonging but active participation, each person both supported by and supporting the whole. The gentle sounds avoid hierarchy - no sharp edges of exclusion, only the soft weaving of lives into shared purpose.
